objectives: SU8.1: Describe the principles of Ethics as it pertains to General Surgery
SU8.2: Demonstrate Professionalism and empathy to the patient A/C
SU8.3: Discuss Medico legal issues in surgical practice A/C
integration: This undergraduate-level roadmap connects Surgical Ethics across foundational sciences and clinical applications.
